list.name: Changes
list.comment:
Add new `view.fxml` file with defined UI structure and controls
- Introduces `BorderPane` layout with `MenuBar`, `ImageView`, and `Label`. - Updates resource paths for stylesheets and images.

project.component: { "keyToString": { "Application.Application.executor": "Run", "Application.Launcher.executor": "Run", "Application.nationalgalleryroutefinder.Launcher.executor": "Run", "Git.Working.Tree.Tab.closed.by.user": "closed", "JUnit.All in National-Gallery-Route-Finder.executor": "Coverage", "ModuleVcsDetector.initialDetectionPerformed": "true", "Notification.DisplayName-DoNotAsk-vcs.commit.finished": "3 files committed", "Notification.DoNotAsk-vcs.commit.finished": "true", "OverrideImplement.generate.javadoc": "true", "RunOnceActivity.MCP Project settings loaded": "true", "RunOnceActivity.ShowReadmeOnStart": "true", "RunOnceActivity.git.unshallow": "true", "SHARE_PROJECT_CONFIGURATION_FILES": "true", "SHELLCHECK.PATH": "C:\\Users\\johan\\AppData\\Roaming\\JetBrains\\IntelliJIdea2026.1\\plugins\\Shell Script\\shellcheck.exe", "codeWithMe.voiceChat.enabledByDefault": "false", "com.intellij.ml.llm.matterhorn.ej.ui.settings.DefaultModelSelectionForGA.v1": "true", "deletionFromPopupRequiresConfirmation": "false", "git-widget-placeholder": "main", "ignore.virus.scanning.warn.message": "true", "junie.onboarding.icon.badge.shown": "true", "last_opened_file_path": "C:/Users/johan/OneDrive - South East Technological University/Computer Science SETU/Semester 4/Data Structures and Algorithms 2/CA2/National-Gallery-Route-Finder", "node.js.detected.package.eslint": "true", "node.js.selected.package.eslint": "(autodetect)", "node.js.selected.package.tslint": "(autodetect)", "project.structure.last.edited": "Project", "project.structure.proportion": "0.0", "project.structure.side.proportion": "0.40114942", "run.code.analysis.last.selected.profile": "pProject Default", "settings.editor.selected.configurable": "org.jetbrains.plugins.github.ui.GithubSettingsConfigurable", "to.speed.mode.migration.done": "true" } }

task.summary: Sets up the main application window with image display features.

Update dependencies and compiler settings
- Bump JavaFX version to 26.0.1 - Consolidate JUnit dependencies into a single artifact - Adjust Maven compiler plugin to use `release` configuration with Java 26

Update UI layout and reorganize resources
- Reworked `view.fxml` to improve structure and layout - Moved `Gallery_Floor_Plan.png` to `images/gallery_floor_plan.png`
Update `.idea/workspace.xml` to modify VCS manager settings and clean up changelist comments

Update `.idea` configuration files and resource paths
- Adjusted JDK language level to 26 in `misc.xml` - Cleaned up `.idea/workspace.xml` to modify VCS settings and changelist comments - Updated resource file paths (e.g., moved `csv` files to dedicated folder)

Remove unused utility classes, reorganize packages, and update resources
- Deleted `BenchmarkUtils`, `ColorUtils`, and `Controller` classes along with `view.fxml` due to redundancy. - Restructured package names from `ie.setu` to `com.nationalgalleryroutefinder`. - Updated `Application.java` to reference new resource paths and included a stylesheets loader. - Cleaned up `.idea/workspace.xml` to reflect updated VCS settings and file paths.

Add new `view.fxml` file with defined UI structure and controls
- Introduces `BorderPane` layout with `MenuBar`, `ImageView`, and `Label`. - Updates resource paths for stylesheets and images.

MESSAGE.value: initial commit
Sets up the main application window with
Sets up the main application window with image display features.

Update dependencies and compiler settings
- Bump JavaFX version to 26.0.1 - Consolidate JUnit dependencies into a single artifact - Adjust Maven compiler plugin to use `release` configuration with Java 26

Update UI layout and reorganize resources
- Reworked `view.fxml` to improve structure and layout - Moved `Gallery_Floor_Plan.png` to `images/gallery_floor_plan.png`
Update `.idea/workspace.xml` to modify VCS settings and clean up change list comments
Update `.idea/workspace.xml` to adjust VCS settings and clean up change list comments
Update `.idea/workspace.xml` to modify VCS manager settings and clean up changelist comments

Reorganize resource files and adjust UI layout
- Moved CSV files to `resources/csv` directory - Updated `view.fxml` to modify `ImageView` dimensions and XML namespace - Adjusted `.idea/workspace.xml` to reflect updated paths and configuration changes

Update `.idea` configuration files
- Clean up redundant changelists in `workspace.xml` - Adjust file paths in project resources for better organization

Update `.idea` configuration files
- Add new shelved changes for VCS and settings updates - Adjust resource paths, including files in `csv` and `images` directories - Modify `workspace.xml` to include updated task and changelist details

Update `.idea` shelf files and workspace configuration
- Include new changelists in `.idea/shelf` - Adjusted VCS settings and JDK language level references in `workspace.xml`

Update `.idea` configuration files
- Relocate resource files for better organization - Adjust JDK language level to 26 in `misc.xml`

Reorganize resources folder and update `.idea/workspace.xml`
- Moved CSV files to a dedicated `csv` folder - Adjusted FXML for updated image dimensions - Updated `.idea/workspace.xml` to reflect new paths and minor IDE settings changes

Update `.idea/shelf` changelists and workspace settings
- Create changelists for `.idea/shelf/` - Adjust paths in workspace configuration

Update `.idea` configuration files
- Modify VCS changelists - Relocate resource files to organized directories

Update `.idea` configuration files
- Adjusted JDK language level to 26 in `misc.xml` - Organized `.idea` files and cleaned up workspace changelist comments

Update `.idea` configuration files
- Adjust JDK language level to 26 in `misc.xml` - Modify VCS manager settings and clean up changelist structure

Update `.idea` configuration
- Add shelved changes for VCS management in `.idea/shelf` - Modify `.idea/workspace.xml` and update file paths in `resources`

Restructure `.idea` configuration and resource files
- Move CSV and image files to organized directories - Update `workspace.xml` to reflect changes

Update `.idea` configuration files
- Add shelved changelists and update workspace and VCS settings - Adjust resource file paths and JDK language level

Update `.idea` configuration files and resource paths
- Adjusted JDK language level to 26 in `misc.xml` - Cleaned up `.idea/workspace.xml` to modify VCS settings and changelist comments - Updated resource file paths (e.g., moved `csv` files to dedicated folder)

Remove deprecated utility classes and unused FXML resources
- Deleted `BenchmarkUtils`, `ColorUtils`, and `Controller.java` as they are no longer in use. - Removed redundant `view.fxml` file and associated UI components.

Remove unused utility classes, reorganize packages, and update resources
- Deleted `BenchmarkUtils`, `ColorUtils`, and `Controller` classes along with `view.fxml` due to redundancy. - Restructured package names from `ie.setu` to `com.nationalgalleryroutefinder`. - Updated `Application.java` to reference new resource paths and included a stylesheets loader. - Cleaned up `.idea/workspace.xml` to reflect updated VCS settings and file paths.

Add new `view.fxml` file with defined UI structure and controls
- Introduces `BorderPane` layout with `MenuBar`, `ImageView`, and `Label`. - Updates resource paths for stylesheets and images.

option.name: LAST_COMMIT_MESSAGE
option.value:
Add new `view.fxml` file with defined UI structure and controls
- Introduces `BorderPane` layout with `MenuBar`, `ImageView`, and `Label`. - Updates resource paths for stylesheets and images.
